commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows and deprecates Plugin SDK public surfaces, moves bundled plugin imports toward focused or provider-owned seams, and updates SDK docs, metadata, scripts, tests, and changelog entries.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source comparison shows current main exports and documents the affected public SDK names while the PR head removes them from package-exported subpaths. An external plugin using those named imports would fail at module binding after upgrade.
commands.review_followup: Draft maintainer-labeled public-SDK cleanup needs explicit API compatibility judgment and contributor real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's real setup proof.
